violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. > Ice scoop found in ice with handle contacting ice. Move to a clean storage location while not in use.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder or bar soap.--Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device.--Handwash lavatory was not supplied with waste receptacle as needed.
